Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 149 

LINE_SRVC_BGN_DT 

LABEL: Claim Line Beginning Date of Service 

DESCRIPTION: For services received during a single encounter with a provider, the date the service was received. For 
services involving multiple encounters on different days, or periods of care extending over two or 
more days, this would be the date on which the service began. For capitation premium payments, the
